creator: alexanderchuranov@gmail.com
text:
The devel/boost port is out of date. Port version is 1.34.1, it was released more than a year ago. Latest boost release version is 1.37. Suggest updating.

Fix: 

Download from one of new locations.
Rapidshare promised to keep the file for 90 days.
How-To-Repeat: Try do download file from specified location at driveway.com
